overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting a journey through a lush wilderness valley. The clip features a horse-drawn carriage passing by, travel along a dirt trail beside dramatic rock formations, a horse rider overtaking the player, and ends with a view of a large wooden railway bridge spanning a river under dramatic cloudy skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy wilderness trail with passing carriage

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes by on the left heading in the same direction

agents.ego_description: moving along a dirt trail through tall grass with a rocky cliff ahead on the left

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage traveling along the trail and passing the camera

entered.detail: large rock formation with trees on top, forming the left boundary of the valley
worn dirt path cutting through the tall grass
lush green grass covering the valley floor
wooden carriage with two horses traveling along the trail

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a grassy wilderness trail with a large rocky cliff visible ahead on the left. A horse-drawn carriage passes by on the left, traveling in the same direction as the camera. The environment is lush and green under a partly cloudy sky.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail with the rocky cliff face on the left side

entered.detail: small trees and bushes dotting the right side of the valley

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the trail, now with the large rock cliff forming a wall on the left side. The carriage has moved ahead and out of view. Scattered trees become visible on the right as the trail progresses through the valley.

events.description: rider on horseback gallops past from behind on the left side

agents.ego_description: traversing open grassland as a horse rider overtakes from behind at speed

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback galloping past the camera along the trail

entered.detail: prominent leafy tree standing alone in the grassland
large wooden railway bridge spanning the distant valley
character on horseback wearing dark clothing

segments.scene_description: The landscape opens up as the rocky cliff recedes behind. A large solitary tree stands in the center of the field, and a wooden railway bridge becomes visible in the far distance on the left. A horse rider suddenly gallops past from behind, overtaking the camera on the left.

events.description: landscape opens to reveal a river valley with the railway bridge spanning across

agents.ego_description: approaching a river with the large wooden railway bridge becoming prominent on the left

entered.detail: calm river flowing through the valley with mist rising from it

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a river valley where the wooden railway bridge dominates the left side of the frame. The river becomes visible on the right with mist hovering above it. The bridge structure grows larger as the camera moves closer, revealing its wooden trestle construction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey along a wilderness trail that transforms from a narrow passage beside towering cliffs into an expansive river valley. It begins on a lush green path as a horse-drawn carriage passes by on the left, with a massive rocky cliff looming ahead. As the camera progresses, the cliff forms a solid wall on the left while scattered trees emerge on the right, eventually receding to open the landscape into a wide field. The scene then shifts as a solitary tree appears and a horse rider suddenly gallops past from behind, revealing a distant wooden railway bridge on the horizon. Finally, the camera approaches the river valley where mist hovers over the water on the right and the wooden trestle bridge grows to dominate the frame.
